nasb.text: “And you, son of man, prophesy to the mountains of Israel and say, ‘O mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord.

esv.text: “And you, son of man, prophesy to the mountains of Israel, and say, O mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要向以色列的眾山說預言：‘以色列的眾山啊！你們要聽耶和華的話。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要向以色列的山岭发预言说，‘以色列的山岭啊，你们要听耶和华的话！
